examples: Of these the largest are EgyptAir, South African Airways (SAA) and Royal Air Maroc (RAM).
Maroc Telecom has shrewdly purchased incumbent telecoms firms in Gabon, Burkina Faso and Mali.
That means that the state airline, Royal Air Maroc, can no longer place ads in most major dailies.
It stems from a law in 1997 which bust Maroc Telecom's monopoly.
S. In-the-know travelers know better than to fly Royal Air Maroc.
